title: Version 2.5 — Mailbox Core
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["2.5.x Mailbox Core"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    login["user auth to mailbox app"] --> imap["IMAP connect request"]
    imap --> tok["session token instead of password header goal"]
    tok --> fold["folder fetch"]
    fold --> list["message list"]
    list --> det["email detail plus DOMPurify"]
    det --> stub["compose stub or placeholder"]
    stub --> gate["2.5 release gate"]
micro_gate:
**Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.3` core path · `.4`–`.6` hardening · `.7`–`.8` integration · `.9` minor freeze / handoff.
